data.name: Milky Harvest
data.detailed_description:
In the heart In the heart of a vibrant, quirky realm where magic weaves through every farmstead, you step into the role of an ambitious dairy entrepreneur in Milky Harvest. Here, FUTA Girls—mystical, sentient beings revered for their nurturing powers and bountiful milk—roam free, embodying the essence of both fertility and fortune.

Long ago, ancient lore tells of a celestial pact between nature and the gods of prosperity. In return for their sacred gift, the cow girls were blessed with the unique ability to produce enchanted milk—liquid gold that can heal, empower, and even transform the lives of those who drink it. As time passed, these legendary FUTA Girls found themselves at the heart of a burgeoning economy. Now, you are tasked with the delicate balance of harnessing this natural wonder for profit, while honoring a tradition steeped in mysticism and respect.

Prepare to embark on a journey where every decision not only grows your fortune but also preserves the magical heritage of these extraordinary and sexy futanari girls. In this whimsical simulation, profit and lore blend into an adventure that celebrates the synergy between ambition and the enchantment of a world like no other.

HOW TO PLAY

Milky Harvest is an interactive simulation game and your goal is to harvest as much milk as possible to different sexy waifu characters in the game.

Simply CLICK and HOLD on the penis of the futanari girl and you can get the gist on how the game works. Keep in mind that you can't just keep jerking off the futa girls since you have an "energy" system limiting you.

Successfully milking the futanari girl will generate you milk, which you can sell for 100 coins per 0.1L (liter).

You can then buy different accessories and upgrades using these coins to further enhance your gameplay strategy.

data.short_description: Enter a magical world where FUTA Girls produce enchanted milk that fuels both desire and fortune. Milk your waifus, manage energy, sell liquid gold, and upgrade your farm in this erotic simulation of profit, pleasure, and mysticism.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
